Class Sample

java.lang.Object
org.tquadrat.foundation.showcase.javadoc.Sample
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, EventListener, AnInterface
@ClassVersion(sourceVersion="$Id: Sample.java 1105 2024-02-28 12:58:46Z tquadrat $") @API(status=STABLE, since="0.1.0") public class Sample extends Object implements Serializable, EventListener, AnInterface

This class serves a sample for the Foundation Library Javadoc extension.

The comments will make use of all the various custom taglets defined in that Javadoc extension. Between the brackets, there is ignored text: [] So is this underlined text. And this an anchor.

And this is the link to the anchor above.

Notes:
  • This class does not anything useful, anything it contains is just used input to Javadoc.
  • This is literal text in a <note>.
  • This is code in a note.
  • We refer here to ! Unfortunately, @link tags don't work in a @node block.
